<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List conversations"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/conversations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Lists conversations with pagination and filtering options.

Results are ordered by creation time (newest first) by default.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
